title: Opposition to appraisal permitted
doc_html:
§182.  Opposition to appraisal permitted

An opposition to the appraisal may be filed by any party to the action at any time before homologation and shall be tried as a summary proceeding.  

Acts 1974, No. 50, §182, eff. Jan. 1, 1975.
